story: Kenny and Jocelin search Keeyan’s bunker on Antugua. Earlier that afternoon in town, Gee quietly pinged two masked riders: “They’ll take the west tunnel—the quick one. Wait there.” In a back hall, four emergency tunnels lead to town; the west run is the shortest. Kenny presses a statue; a hidden shelf swings open to a book and a note from Keeyan. A pistol cocks in the dark.
implausible_knowledge: Earlier that afternoon in town, Gee quietly pinged two masked riders: “They’ll take the west tunnel—the quick one. Wait there.”
question: With a gun leveled at them and only seconds to choose an escape route among the four tunnels, which way will Kenny lead Jocelin?
answer_with_knowledge: Avoid the west and head down the longer east tunnel.
answer_without_knowledge: Rush into the west tunnel, the quickest route to town.
